<rdf:RDF 
    xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#" 
    xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#" 
    xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#" 
    xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#" 
    xmlns:onto="http://iiitb.ac.in/ontology/autonomous#">

  <!-- Classes -->
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="AcademicProgram">
    <rdfs:comment>The concept of an academic program</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="PostgraduateProgram">
    <rdfs:comment>A postgraduate academic program</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource="#AcademicProgram"/>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Goal">
    <rdfs:comment>A goal or objective</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="EducationGoal">
    <rdfs:comment>A goal related to education</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource="#Goal"/>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Section">
    <rdfs:comment>A section or component of an academic program</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <!-- Object Properties -->
  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="hasGoal">
    <rdfs:comment>Relates an academic program to its goal</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#AcademicProgram"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#Goal"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>

  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="hasSection">
    <rdfs:comment>Relates an academic program to its section</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#AcademicProgram"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#Section"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>

  <!-- Individuals -->
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="M_Tech_CSE">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#PostgraduateProgram"/>
    <onto:hasGoal rdf:resource="#DevelopProfessionals"/>
    <onto:hasSection rdf:resource="#Courses"/>
    <onto:hasSection rdf:resource="#Seminars"/>
    <onto:hasSection rdf:resource="#ProjectWork"/>
    <onto:hasSection rdf:resource="#Internships"/>
    <onto:hasSection rdf:resource="#Research"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="DevelopProfessionals">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#EducationGoal"/>
    <rdfs:comment>Develop professionals of high quality</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="Courses">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Section"/>
    <rdfs:comment>Courses of study</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="Seminars">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Section"/>
    <rdfs:comment>Seminars</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="ProjectWork">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Section"/>
    <rdfs:comment>Project work</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="Internships">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Section"/>
    <rdfs:comment>Internships</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="Research">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Section"/>
    <rdfs:comment>Research leading to a thesis</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

</rdf:RDF>
